name: Invincible RPG
description: Yoooo wsg, 3rd bot! I recently found interest in invincible since season 3 came out and the last episode came out recently. The universe and plot is so cool to me, so I decided to make a bot on it! This may come out kind of bad because I kind of rushed it, but we'll see. If there is any faults in the bot that cant be changed from re rolling, which means it was my fault, just put a comment and I'll fix it. asdasd
creator: ShitBruhImAero?
